armies.name: Strike Force Octavius
armies.tagline: Leviathan box Terminator spearhead — Oath of Moment and deep strike
armies.playstyle: Terminators and Infernus Marines hold the line while Captain Octavius and Librarian Tantus strike objectives. Oath of Moment lets you focus fire on one priority target each Command phase.

battleTraits.name: Oath of Moment
battleTraits.summary: In your Command phase, pick one enemy unit. Until your next Command phase, that unit is your Oath of Moment target and you re-roll Hit rolls against it.

enhancements.name: Champion Duellist
enhancements.summary: Gives Captain Octavius extra melee prowess — re-roll Hit rolls in Fight and +1 Attack on his melee weapons.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Recommended first game — the default Leviathan enhancement.

enhancements.name: Oathsworn Determination
enhancements.summary: Optional Warlord upgrade — swap from Champion Duellist before battle if you want a different plan.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Try once you know how Octavius fights on the table.

secondaryObjectives.name: Wrath of the Emperor
secondaryObjectives.summary: At the end of each phase, score 2 VP if Captain Octavius destroyed one or more enemy models that phase.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Default pick — send your Captain into the fight.

secondaryObjectives.name: Shock Tactics
secondaryObjectives.summary: At the end of your turn, score 5 VP if you control one or more objectives your opponent controlled at the start of that turn.

stratagems.name: Gene-wrought Resilience
stratagems.summary: When targeted, subtract 1 from Wound rolls if the attack's Strength exceeds your unit's Toughness.

stratagems.name: Veteran Instincts
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Wound rolls of 1 in Fight; re-roll all Wounds vs Monsters or Vehicles.

stratagems.name: Duty and Honour
stratagems.summary: At end of Command, lock an objective you control even after moving off it.

armies.name: The Penitent Host
armies.tagline: Miracle dice, repentia charges, and a Rhino full of zealots
armies.playstyle: Ellyrine buffs Battle Sisters while Repentia and the Penitent Engine hit objectives. Act of Faith miracle dice forgive bad rolls; use the Rhino to deliver melee squads safely.

battleTraits.name: Act of Faith
battleTraits.summary: Gain Miracle dice at the start of each turn and when a unit is destroyed. Spend them instead of rolling Advance, Battle-shock, Charge, Damage, Hit, Saving throw, or Wound rolls.
battleTraits.timing: Start of each turn; when units destroyed

enhancements.name: Armour of Faith
enhancements.summary: Ellyrine gains Feel No Pain 4+; models in her unit gain Feel No Pain 5+.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — keeps the warlord and her bodyguard alive.

enhancements.name: Saintly Relic
enhancements.summary: In Command, if Ellyrine controls an objective and is not Battle-shocked, gain 1 Miracle dice (re-roll when gained).
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Extra miracle dice for objective play.

secondaryObjectives.name: Divine Judgement
secondaryObjectives.summary: Mark one non-Monster/Vehicle enemy unit at start of round 1. Score 6 VP if destroyed (10 VP if destroyed in melee).
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Default — hunt the marked unit with Repentia.

secondaryObjectives.name: Rites of Reconsecration
secondaryObjectives.summary: From round 2, score 3 VP at end of your turn if a unit is wholly in the enemy deployment zone and not Battle-shocked.

stratagems.name: Divine Protection
stratagems.summary: When targeted, one unit gains 5+ invulnerable (4+ for Battle Sisters or Seraphim).

stratagems.name: Holy Cleansing
stratagems.summary: One Infantry unit that has not attacked gains Lethal Hits until end of phase.

stratagems.name: Martyr's Death
stratagems.summary: When a model is destroyed before fighting, it fights after attackers finish (then is removed).

armies.name: Guardians of the Throne
armies.tagline: Custodes and Sisters of Silence — elite talons with stance-switching melee
armies.playstyle: Choose Vertus Praetors or Custodian Guard before battle. Shield-Captain Tyvan leads the strike while Prosecutors and Vigilators support objectives.

battleTraits.name: Martial Ka'tah
battleTraits.summary: At the start of the Fight phase, pick Dacatarai (Sustained Hits 1) or Rendnax (Lethal Hits) for your army until end of phase.

enhancements.name: Auramite Thunderbolt
enhancements.summary: Shield-Captain Tyvan's unit re-rolls Advance and Charge rolls.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default pick — helps Tyvan reach combat reliably.

enhancements.name: Blade of Vaults
enhancements.summary: When Tyvan attacks, improve AP on Critical Wounds by 1.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Swap in for tougher targets once you know the patrol.

secondaryObjectives.name: Guardian of the Realm
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 1 VP each phase Tyvan destroys a model; 2 VP if near an objective.

secondaryObjectives.name: Drive the Talons Deep
secondaryObjectives.summary: From round 2, score 3 VP at end of opponent's turn if a unit is wholly in their deployment zone.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Deep strike Vertus or Guard for board pressure.

stratagems.name: Wrath of the Host
stratagems.summary: When Tyvan is destroyed, your ranged weapons gain Sustained Hits 1 vs the killer's unit for the rest of the battle.

stratagems.name: Gilded Magnificence
stratagems.summary: One unit gains +1 Objective Control until your next Command phase.

stratagems.name: Tireless Pursuit
stratagems.summary: After an enemy Falls Back, one of your units that was engaged can Normal Move if not engaged elsewhere.

armies.name: Maniple Verask-Alpha
armies.tagline: Doctrina Imperatives and a Dunecrawler firing line
armies.playstyle: Pick Protector or Conqueror Imperative each round. Rangers and Kataphrons hold the line while the Onager Dunecrawler anchors firepower; Verask repairs the walker or buffs the Rangers.

battleTraits.name: Doctrina Imperatives
battleTraits.summary: Each battle round pick Protector (Heavy; −1 AP vs you in your zone) or Conqueror (Assault; +1 AP vs enemies in their zone).

enhancements.name: Omniballistic Data-tether
enhancements.summary: When Verask's unit shoots, re-roll one Hit and one Wound roll.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — buff the Ranger squad.

enhancements.name: Imperative Surge-wafer
enhancements.summary: Once per battle when Verask's unit shoots, ranged weapons gain Precision until end of phase.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Snipe enemy characters with the Rangers.

secondaryObjectives.name: Explorator Acquisition
secondaryObjectives.summary: From round 2, roll D6+1 per objective you control in Command; on 7+ score 4 VP (max 12 VP).
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Default — hold objectives for the roll.

secondaryObjectives.name: Holy Apparatus
secondaryObjectives.summary: End of battle: 4 VP if Verask lives; 4 VP if Dunecrawler is not destroyed/Below Half-strength (2 VP if Below Half).

stratagems.name: Retribution Codes
stratagems.summary: When a Tech-Priest is destroyed, re-roll Hit rolls of 1 vs the killer's unit for the rest of the battle.

stratagems.name: Reactive Field-shroud
stratagems.summary: One Tech-Priest or Skitarii unit targeted gains 4+ invulnerable until end of phase.

stratagems.name: Retrogradial Targeting
stratagems.summary: After a Tech-Priest Falls Back, it is eligible to shoot this turn.

armies.name: Karsk's Gunners
armies.tagline: Cadian line infantry, artillery, and Voice of Command orders
armies.playstyle: Hold the firing line with Shock Troops and Field Ordnance while Karsk issues orders. Armoured Sentinel skirmishes flanks; Send in the Next Wave replaces destroyed infantry.

battleTraits.name: Voice of Command
battleTraits.summary: In Command phase, Officers issue Move! Move! Move!, Take Aim!, or Take Cover! to units within 6".

enhancements.name: Command Laurels
enhancements.summary: Gain 1 CP in Command if Karsk is on the field; orders apply to all Astra Militarum units.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — orders reach the whole army.

enhancements.name: Gunnery Officer
enhancements.summary: Gain 1 CP in Command if Karsk is on the field; Artillery within 6" re-roll attack dice and gain Lone Operative until they shoot.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Artillery-focused plan with the Field Ordnance Battery.

secondaryObjectives.name: Hold the Line
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 3 VP if no enemies wholly in your deployment zone (5 VP if none within 6").

secondaryObjectives.name: Methodical Destruction
secondaryObjectives.summary: Pick an enemy unit each round; score 4 VP if it is destroyed by end of round.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Focus fire with artillery and lasguns.

stratagems.name: Send in the Next Wave
stratagems.summary: Replace a destroyed Cadian Shock Troops unit at original strength within 9" of your board edge.

stratagems.name: Bring It Down
stratagems.summary: Selected units re-roll Hit rolls against one enemy unit in Shooting.

stratagems.name: Artillery Strike
stratagems.summary: Once per battle — enemies halve Move, cannot Advance or charge, and subtract 1 from Hit rolls until end of round.

armies.name: Aurellios' Banishers
armies.tagline: Teleport Assault, psychic precision, Terminators or a Dreadknight
armies.playstyle: Remove a unit at end of opponent's turn and redeploy 9" away next Movement phase. Choose Terminators or Nemesis Dreadknight before battle; Aurellios snipes characters with precision witchfire.

battleTraits.name: Teleport Assault
battleTraits.summary: End of opponent's turn, remove one unengaged Grey Knights unit; redeploy 9" from enemies in your next Movement Reinforcements step.

enhancements.name: Banishment Stone (Psychic)
enhancements.summary: When Aurellios destroys an enemy Character, roll D6: on 2+ gain 1 CP.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — hunt enemy leaders.

enhancements.name: Dominating Aura (Psychic)
enhancements.summary: Aurellios has Objective Control 3.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Contest objectives with the warlord.

secondaryObjectives.name: Champion of Titan
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 6 VP each time Aurellios destroys an enemy Character.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Default — focus fire on enemy warlords.

secondaryObjectives.name: No Escape
secondaryObjectives.summary: Once per battle, score 10 VP at end of opponent's turn if you control both edge objectives.

stratagems.name: Warded Plate
stratagems.summary: When targeted, subtract 1 from Wound rolls if attack Strength exceeds unit Toughness.

stratagems.name: Unyielding to the Last
stratagems.summary: When a model is destroyed before fighting, on 4+ it fights after attackers then is removed.

stratagems.name: Emergency Teleport
stratagems.summary: Engaged Infantry can use Teleport Assault even while in Engagement Range.

armies.name: Imperial Agents
armies.tagline: 2024 box — Inquisitor, Voidsmen, Sanctifiers, and Subductors
armies.playstyle: Mixed agents force: Terminator Inquisitor leads the strike while Voidsmen hold range, Sanctifiers and Subductors contest objectives. Verify enhancement and stratagem names in your box PDF.

battleTraits.name: Unquestionable Authority
battleTraits.summary: Agents of the Imperium units gain re-rolls to Hit or Wound when within range of your Inquisitor (see box PDF for exact wording).

enhancements.name: See box PDF (Enhancement 1)
enhancements.summary: Pick one of two Inquisitor enhancements from the Combat Patrol: Imperial Agents rules sheet.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — use the first enhancement listed in your PDF.

enhancements.name: See box PDF (Enhancement 2)
enhancements.summary: Alternate Inquisitor enhancement from the Combat Patrol: Imperial Agents rules sheet.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Swap once you know how the patrol plays.

secondaryObjectives.name: See box PDF (Secondary 1)
secondaryObjectives.summary: First secondary objective from the Imperial Agents Combat Patrol PDF.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Default — pick the objective that matches your plan.

secondaryObjectives.name: See box PDF (Secondary 2)
secondaryObjectives.summary: Second secondary objective from the Imperial Agents Combat Patrol PDF.

stratagems.name: See box PDF (Stratagem 1)
stratagems.summary: First stratagem from the Imperial Agents Combat Patrol PDF.

stratagems.name: See box PDF (Stratagem 2)
stratagems.summary: Second stratagem from the Imperial Agents Combat Patrol PDF.

stratagems.name: See box PDF (Stratagem 3)
stratagems.summary: Third stratagem from the Imperial Agents Combat Patrol PDF.

armies.name: Armiger Trailblazers
armies.tagline: Two Armigers — custom Gouge a Foothold mission (not the six-pack)
armies.playstyle: Fast Armiger pair with Bonded Pilots-style buffs. This patrol uses its own primary objective (Gouge a Foothold) instead of the standard six Combat Patrol missions — agree with your opponent before setup.

battleTraits.name: Exemplars of Honour
battleTraits.summary: Each Command phase, if both Armigers are on the battlefield, select one — it regains D3 wounds, or both gain +1 to Hit rolls until your next Command phase.

enhancements.name: Enhancement for your General
enhancements.summary: The Armiger you chose as General gets the enhancement tied to that pilot in the box PDF.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — read the enhancement for your chosen General.

enhancements.name: Enhancement for the other Armiger
enhancements.summary: The non-General Armiger's enhancement from the box PDF (if applicable).
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Some games use only the General's enhancement.

secondaryObjectives.name: Gouge a Foothold
secondaryObjectives.summary: This patrol's bespoke primary — score VP for controlling objectives in the enemy half (see Armiger Trailblazers PDF). Replaces standard mission primaries.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Default — this is the patrol's main scoring card.

secondaryObjectives.name: See box PDF (Secondary)
secondaryObjectives.summary: Second scoring card from the Armiger Trailblazers rules sheet if listed.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Optional second pick if your PDF offers two.

stratagems.name: See box PDF (Stratagem 1)
stratagems.summary: First Armiger Trailblazers stratagem from the box PDF.

stratagems.name: See box PDF (Stratagem 2)
stratagems.summary: Second stratagem from the box PDF.

stratagems.name: See box PDF (Stratagem 3)
stratagems.summary: Third stratagem from the box PDF.

armies.name: Dark Zealots
armies.tagline: Dark Pacts, Legionaries, Havocs, and a Helbrute
armies.playstyle: Balanced patrol — Ghallaron buffs melee Legionaries while Havocs and the Helbrute handle range threats. Dark Pacts add Lethal Hits or Sustained Hits but risk mortal wounds on failed Leadership.

battleTraits.name: Dark Pacts
battleTraits.summary: When a unit shoots or fights, it may take a Dark Pact for Lethal Hits or Sustained Hits 1 until end of phase; then take a Leadership test or suffer D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Hateful Exhortation
enhancements.summary: Round 1, Ghallaron picks an enemy unit; when he or his unit attacks it, improve AP by 1 on Critical Wounds for the battle.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — mark a priority target early.

enhancements.name: Infernal Blessing
enhancements.summary: Ghallaron gains Feel No Pain 5+.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Survivability if Ghallaron leads from the front.

secondaryObjectives.name: Champion of the Dark Gods
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 3 VP at end of each phase Ghallaron destroyed one or more enemy models.

secondaryObjectives.name: Idolatrous Despoilers
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 4 VP at end of opponent's turn if one or more units are wholly in their deployment zone.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Deep strike or push Legionaries forward.

stratagems.name: Empyric Rites
stratagems.summary: Targeted Infantry gains 4+ invulnerable until end of phase.

stratagems.name: Bitter Blows
stratagems.summary: When a model is destroyed before fighting, on 4+ it fights after attackers then is removed.

stratagems.name: Malicious Volleys
stratagems.summary: One Infantry unit re-rolls Hit rolls of 1 when shooting (any Hit roll vs Below Half-strength targets).

armies.name: Butchers of Hyporia
armies.tagline: Shadow of Chaos, deep striking Bloodletters, and Khorne hounds
armies.playstyle: Expand Shadow of Chaos by controlling objectives; regenerate Battleline models in the shadow. Deep strike Bloodletters with Kh'har'ret while Flesh Hounds and Bloodcrushers flank.

battleTraits.name: The Shadows of Chaos
battleTraits.summary: Shadow covers your deployment zone and zones where you control half the objectives. Allies in Shadow pass Battle-shock on 4+ to regain wounds/models; enemies subtract 1 from Battle-shock and take D3 mortals on fail.

enhancements.name: Incarnated Rage
enhancements.summary: While Kh'har'ret leads a unit, melee weapons in that unit gain Lethal Hits.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — charge with Bloodletters and the Butcher.

enhancements.name: Warp Locus (Aura)
enhancements.summary: Areas within 3" of Kh'har'ret count as in your Shadow of Chaos.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Carry the Shadow into the mid-board.

secondaryObjectives.name: Worthy Offerings
secondaryObjectives.summary: End of battle: 6 VP if enemy Warlord destroyed (10 VP if Kh'har'ret killed it).

secondaryObjectives.name: Dark Conjunction
secondaryObjectives.summary: From round 2, score 1 VP per non-deployment objective in your Shadow of Chaos.

stratagems.name: Blood-Maddened Banishment
stratagems.summary: When a Bloodletter is destroyed before fighting, on 4+ it fights after attackers then is removed.

stratagems.name: Empyric Predators
stratagems.summary: After an enemy moves, unshot Flesh Hounds within 6" Normal move up to 6" (cannot be overwatched this phase).

stratagems.name: Manifest Hate
stratagems.summary: When targeted in Shooting, the unit gains 4+ invulnerable until end of phase.

armies.name: Slaughter Talon
armies.tagline: Two War Dogs — Hunter Pack rule and Ravening Onslaught quarry
armies.playstyle: Brigand and Stalker pair with Hunter Pack (heal, move, or Sustained Hits 2 in melee each Command phase). Uses Ravening Onslaught quarry scoring instead of the standard six missions.

battleTraits.name: Hunter Pack
battleTraits.summary: Each Command phase, target one Knight — heal 1 wound, move D3+1", or grant Sustained Hits 2 to melee until next Command phase.

enhancements.name: Feral Hunter
enhancements.summary: Karthon & Firegheist gain Deep Strike (General's enhancement if this Knight is your warlord).
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default when Karthon is General — reserve ambush.

enhancements.name: Frenzied to the Last
enhancements.summary: When Zarkys & Helskarr die in melee, on 2+ fight one last time before removal (General's enhancement if this Knight is your warlord).
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default when Zarkys is General — trade up in combat.

secondaryObjectives.name: Ravening Onslaught
secondaryObjectives.summary: Each player marks Primary and Secondary quarry units in Command; score 5/10 VP if destroyed by next Command phase.

secondaryObjectives.name: See box PDF (Secondary)
secondaryObjectives.summary: Alternate secondary if listed on the Slaughter Talon rules sheet.

stratagems.name: Infernal Rage
stratagems.summary: One War Dog gains +1 Strength and +4 feet attacks (+2 Slaughterclaw if Stalker).

stratagems.name: Hunter's Stride
stratagems.summary: One War Dog that has not moved may leap over enemy models when it moves.

stratagems.name: Lunging Strike
stratagems.summary: One War Dog Falls Back and can charge (not the unit it fell back from).

armies.name: The Shambling Horde
armies.tagline: Contagion aura, Poxwalker hordes, and Walking Plague
armies.playstyle: Typhus and Poxwalkers flood the board while Plague Marines and Grelch provide ranged support. Contagion Range grows each round, softening targets for melee.

battleTraits.name: Nurgle's Gift
battleTraits.summary: Contagion Range is 3" round 1, 6" round 2, 9" from round 3. Enemies in range lose 1 Toughness.
battleTraits.timing: Passive — range grows each battle round

enhancements.name: Walking Plague
enhancements.summary: In Command, one Poxwalker unit within Contagion Range of Typhus returns up to D6 models.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — recycle Poxwalkers with Typhus.

enhancements.name: Miasmic Arrival
enhancements.summary: Typhus' unit gains Deep Strike.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Reserve Typhus and a Poxwalker block.

secondaryObjectives.name: Contaminate Ground
secondaryObjectives.summary: From round 2, score 3 VP if one or more Death Guard units are within 3" of the battlefield centre.

secondaryObjectives.name: Spread the Blight
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 2 VP when you destroy a unit that began the phase in Contagion Range.

stratagems.name: Corrosive Effluents
stratagems.summary: One unit that has not shot/fought improves AP by 1 when attacking this phase.

stratagems.name: Harbingers of Despair
stratagems.summary: Start of Fight — enemies in Engagement Range with your unit take Battle-shock.

stratagems.name: Disgustingly Resilient
stratagems.summary: When targeted, subtract 1 from Damage (minimum 1).

armies.name: Callous Blades
armies.tagline: 2025 EC box — Flawless Blades and Infractors; verify rules in PDF
armies.playstyle: Fast Slaanesh melee patrol: Kaphrael leads Flawless Blades into priority targets while Infractors hold objectives. Download the Emperor's Children Combat Patrol PDF for exact army rule, enhancements, and stratagem text.

battleTraits.name: Emperor's Children Army Rule
battleTraits.summary: Use the Combat Patrol army rule printed in the Callous Blades / Emperor's Children PDF (rules may differ from full codex).

enhancements.name: See box PDF (Enhancement 1)
enhancements.summary: First Lord Kaphrael enhancement from the Emperor's Children Combat Patrol PDF.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — first option in your rules sheet.

enhancements.name: See box PDF (Enhancement 2)
enhancements.summary: Second enhancement from the Emperor's Children Combat Patrol PDF.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Swap once you know Kaphrael's role.

secondaryObjectives.name: See box PDF (Secondary 1)
secondaryObjectives.summary: First secondary from the Emperor's Children Combat Patrol PDF.

secondaryObjectives.name: See box PDF (Secondary 2)
secondaryObjectives.summary: Second secondary from the Emperor's Children Combat Patrol PDF.

stratagems.name: See box PDF (Stratagem 1)
stratagems.summary: First stratagem from the Emperor's Children Combat Patrol PDF.

stratagems.name: See box PDF (Stratagem 2)
stratagems.summary: Second stratagem from the PDF.

stratagems.name: See box PDF (Stratagem 3)
stratagems.summary: Third stratagem from the PDF.

armies.name: The Coven Temporus
armies.tagline: Cabal rituals, Scarab Occult Terminators, and Tzaangor chaff
armies.playstyle: Generate Cabal points from Psykers each Command phase; spend on Weaver of Fates or Echoes from the Warp. Terminators absorb fire while Tzaangors flood objectives.

battleTraits.name: Cabal of Sorcerers
battleTraits.summary: End of Command phase, Psykers generate Cabal points. Spend on Weaver of Fates (2: re-roll one save) or Echoes from the Warp (6: 0CP stratagem on Psyker unit once per round). Points reset next Command.

enhancements.name: Temporal Sorceries
enhancements.summary: Ahrak gains Deep Strike and Lone Operative; while on field gain D3 Cabal points.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — extra Cabal fuel.

enhancements.name: Arch-Diabolist
enhancements.summary: Ahrak gains Deep Strike and Lone Operative; Screamer Invocations gain Pistol.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Aggressive witchfire in melee.

secondaryObjectives.name: Sorcerous Ritual
secondaryObjectives.summary: From round 2, if Psykers hold a non-deployment objective, roll D6+Cabal (max +3) at end of opponent's Fight; on 5+ score 3 VP.

secondaryObjectives.name: Bringer of Change
secondaryObjectives.summary: End of each phase, score D3 VP for psychic kills (max 12 VP total).

stratagems.name: Wreathed in Warpflame
stratagems.summary: One non-Tzaangor unit gains Lethal Hits and Critical Hit 5+ vs Monsters/Vehicles in Fight.

stratagems.name: Mutant Cunning
stratagems.summary: When Tzaangors are targeted, they Normal move D6 and gain Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: Malign Entanglement
stratagems.summary: Charging unit subtracts 2 from Charge rolls.

armies.name: Karagar's Rampagers
armies.tagline: Blessings of Khorne, 20 Berzerkers, and all-in melee
armies.playstyle: Roll eight dice each round for up to two Blessings of Khorne. Berzerkers and Karagar rush objectives; Jakhals hold home objectives or absorb fire.

battleTraits.name: Blessings of Khorne
battleTraits.summary: Start of battle round roll 8D6; activate up to two Blessings (Feel No Pain 6+, fight on death, or Lethal Hits) until end of round using dice combos shown in rules.

enhancements.name: Skulls for Khorne
enhancements.summary: When Karagar destroys an enemy unit in melee, on 2+ gain 1 CP.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — fuel stratagems with kills.

enhancements.name: Arch-Slaughterer
enhancements.summary: Karagar's melee weapons gain Precision.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Snipe characters in combat.

secondaryObjectives.name: Ravage and Ransack
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 4 VP if you control the objective closest to the opponent's board edge.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Default — push to their back line.

secondaryObjectives.name: Blood Offering
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 2 VP when a model destroys an enemy unit with melee if that unit started the phase on an objective.

stratagems.name: Rage Unchecked
stratagems.summary: Below Half-strength Berzerkers that have not fought gain Sustained Hits 1.

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Fury
stratagems.summary: Before Consolidate, move up to 6" instead of 3" if still engaged.

stratagems.name: Overwhelming Onslaught
stratagems.summary: After charging, target enemy takes Battle-shock with -1.

armies.name: Gordrang's Gitstompas
armies.tagline: Boyz, Deffkoptas, and a Deff Dread — call a Waaagh! and krump
armies.playstyle: Rush objectives with Boyz and Gordrang while Deffkoptas contest flanks. Time the Waaagh! for melee spikes; Proper Lootin' scores from held objectives.

battleTraits.name: Waaagh!
battleTraits.summary: Once per battle at start of a battle round: units can charge after Advancing, +1 Attacks and Strength in melee, and gain 5+ invulnerable saves.
battleTraits.timing: Once per battle — start of battle round

enhancements.name: Grizzled Skarboy
enhancements.summary: When Gordrang is hit by a ranged attack, halve the Damage characteristic.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — keeps Gordrang alive in the open.

enhancements.name: Tellyporta
enhancements.summary: One Boyz unit and Gordrang gain Deep Strike; set up within 3" of each other.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Surprise krump from reserves.

secondaryObjectives.name: Stomp 'Em
secondaryObjectives.summary: From round 2, pick an enemy unit; score 3 VP if destroyed by your melee this round.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Default — hunt with Boyz and the Dread.

secondaryObjectives.name: Proper Lootin'
secondaryObjectives.summary: In Command, loot controlled objectives with Orks not in combat — D6 2-4 for 3 VP, 5+ for 5 VP.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Hold and roll for extra VP.

stratagems.name: Get Stuck In
stratagems.summary: One Ork unit that has not fought yet — Pile-in and Consolidation up to 6".

stratagems.name: Brutal but Kunnin'
stratagems.summary: One Orks Infantry unit can declare a charge even if it Fell Back this turn.

stratagems.name: Krump Da Gitz
stratagems.summary: After an enemy shoots your Orks unit, that unit can Normal Move D6" toward the shooter.

armies.name: The Fatebreakers
armies.tagline: Strands of Fate dice pool and Windrider hit-and-run
armies.playstyle: Bank Fate dice at start, spend to fix key rolls. Guardians and Wraithlord anchor fire while Windriders and Zephyr-swift reposition after shooting.

battleTraits.name: Strands of Fate
battleTraits.summary: Start of battle roll 12D6 (may re-roll down to 1 die) to form Fate dice. Once per phase replace one roll with a Fate die before rolling.
battleTraits.timing: Start of battle; once per phase

enhancements.name: Foresight
enhancements.summary: Once per turn, Fire Overwatch on Iraneth's unit costs 0CP.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — reactive shooting.

enhancements.name: Eldritch Might
enhancements.summary: Iraneth re-rolls one Hit, Wound, or Damage roll on psychic attacks.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Reliable Eldritch Storm damage.

secondaryObjectives.name: Ineffable Agenda
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 3 VP at end of your turn if you control objectives outside your deployment you did not control at turn start.

secondaryObjectives.name: A Greater Destiny
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 10 VP at battle end if one or more units are wholly in enemy deployment.

stratagems.name: Whip-Fast Reactions
stratagems.summary: Targeted Infantry or Mounted subtract 1 from incoming Hit rolls.

stratagems.name: Storm of Shots
stratagems.summary: Up to two Mounted or one Infantry unit gain +1 to Hit when shooting.

stratagems.name: Zephyr-Swift
stratagems.summary: Up to two Mounted or one Infantry Normal move 6" after Shooting (cannot charge).

armies.name: The Blades of Torment
armies.tagline: Power from Pain tokens, Raider transport, and Ravager fire
armies.playstyle: Earn Pain tokens when enemies fail Battle-shock or die; spend for re-rolls or Empowered Through Pain. Raider delivers Incubi or Kabalites; Ravager handles heavy targets.

battleTraits.name: Power from Pain
battleTraits.summary: Start with 1 Pain token; gain more when enemies are destroyed or fail Battle-shock. Spend at phase start for Advance/Charge re-rolls or Hit re-rolls in Shooting/Fight.
battleTraits.timing: Start of Movement, Charge, Shooting, or Fight phase

enhancements.name: Shudderworm Bottle
enhancements.summary: Models in Malivex's unit gain Feel No Pain 5+.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — keeps the Archon's unit alive.

enhancements.name: Spiteful Predator
enhancements.summary: Malivex's unit may shoot or charge after Falling Back.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Hit-and-run with Kabalites.

secondaryObjectives.name: Rapacious Raiders
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 3 VP (4 VP with Infantry) at end of your turn if Drukhari are wholly in enemy deployment (Battle-shocked enemies don't count).

secondaryObjectives.name: Murderous Monster
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 3 VP at end of Fight if Malivex destroyed one or more models.

stratagems.name: Quicksilver Reactions
stratagems.summary: Targeted Infantry subtract 1 from incoming Hit rolls.

stratagems.name: Many Cuts
stratagems.summary: One Infantry unit gains Sustained Hits 1 vs Below Half-strength targets.

stratagems.name: There and Gone
stratagems.summary: End of opponent's Fight, embark Infantry into a nearby Raider.

armies.name: Hand of the Magus
armies.tagline: Cult Ambush markers, Deep Strike Hybrids, and Rockgrinder rush
armies.playstyle: Destroyed units may return via Cult Ambush markers. Neophytes hold objectives while Aberrants and the Rockgrinder crash into weak points; Magus stays with a scoring unit.

battleTraits.name: Cult Ambush
battleTraits.summary: When a unit is destroyed, roll D6 (+1 Battleline, +1 rounds 1–2); on 5+ place a Cult Ambush marker. End of Reinforcements, spawn identical units at markers 9" from enemies.
battleTraits.timing: When units destroyed; end of Reinforcements

enhancements.name: Psionic Shield
enhancements.summary: When Veridielle leads a unit, add 1 to saves vs ranged attacks.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — protect Neophytes on objectives.

enhancements.name: Resonance Stave
enhancements.summary: Veridielle's melee weapons gain Anti-infantry 5+ and Devastating Wounds.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Melee Magus plan.

secondaryObjectives.name: Rise Up
secondaryObjectives.summary: From round 2, roll D6 per objective held by Neophyte Hybrids at end of opponent's turn; 1–3 for 1 VP, 4+ for 3 VP.

secondaryObjectives.name: Will of the Patriarch
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 15 VP if Veridielle is within 3" of battlefield centre at battle end.

stratagems.name: Defend the Magus
stratagems.summary: Engaged friendly unit re-rolls Hit and Wound rolls of 1 vs the enemy engaging Veridielle.

stratagems.name: Lurking Killers
stratagems.summary: When targeted, subtract 1 from incoming Hit rolls.

stratagems.name: Return to the Shadows
stratagems.summary: After an enemy moves within 9", Infantry Normal move D6 (Veridielle up to 6").

armies.name: Warspeke's Prospect
armies.tagline: Judgement tokens, Hearthkyn wall, and Hernkyn flanks
armies.playstyle: Enemies earn Judgement tokens when they kill your units; spend for +1 Hit or +1 Hit and Wound. Pioneers scout while Beserks and Warriors hold the centre with Warspeke.

battleTraits.name: Eye of the Ancestors
battleTraits.summary: When an enemy destroys a Votann unit they gain Judgement tokens (max 2). 1 token: +1 Hit; 2 tokens: +1 Hit and +1 Wound vs that enemy.

enhancements.name: Waste Feeds the Void
enhancements.summary: Warspeke's unit re-rolls Hit rolls of 1 when shooting and may shoot after Falling Back.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — mobile Warrior brick.

enhancements.name: Prâgmaat Comms Uplink
enhancements.summary: Warspeke's unit gains +1 OC and re-rolls Battle-shock.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Hold objectives with Hearthkyn.

secondaryObjectives.name: Toil Earns
secondaryObjectives.summary: Mark one non-deployment objective at deploy; from round 2 score 4 VP if you control it at end of your turn.

secondaryObjectives.name: Settle a Grudge
secondaryObjectives.summary: Each round from 2, mark an enemy with Judgement tokens; score 4 VP if destroyed that round.

stratagems.name: Payment in Kind
stratagems.summary: When your unit is destroyed, re-roll Hit rolls of 1 vs the killer for rest of battle.

stratagems.name: Pan-Spectral Sweep
stratagems.summary: One unit that has not shot gains Lethal Hits on ranged weapons.

stratagems.name: Skeinwrought Physiology
stratagems.summary: When targeted in Shooting, improve Save by 1.

armies.name: Amonhotekh's Guard
armies.tagline: Reanimation Protocols, gauss firepower, and methodical objective play
armies.playstyle: Regenerate wounds each Command phase while Immortals and Amonhotekh hold the line. Reclaim and Dominate rewards deep strikes into the enemy zone.

battleTraits.name: Reanimation Protocols
battleTraits.summary: End of your Command phase, each unit regains D3 wounds or returns models at 1 wound to reach Starting Strength.

enhancements.name: Overriding Control
enhancements.summary: Units led by Amonhotekh can shoot in the turn they Fall Back.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — keeps shooting while repositioning.

enhancements.name: Protocol of Resonant Focus
enhancements.summary: In Command, pick a visible enemy within 12" — friendly Necrons re-roll Hit rolls of 1 against it.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Focus fire on one priority target.

secondaryObjectives.name: Reclaim and Dominate
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 4 VP at end of your turn if a unit is wholly in the enemy deployment zone.

secondaryObjectives.name: Treasures of Aeons
secondaryObjectives.summary: Mark one NML objective at start of round 1; score 3 VP when you destroy a unit that started the phase on it.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Defend or contest the marked site.

stratagems.name: Mercurial Resilience
stratagems.summary: When selected to shoot or fight, one unit gains 5+ invulnerable saves.

stratagems.name: Disruption Fields
stratagems.summary: One unit that has not fought yet gains +1 Strength on melee weapons this phase.

stratagems.name: Will of the Overlord
stratagems.summary: One unit gains +1 Objective Control until your next Command phase.

armies.name: Protectors of Aun'Shar
armies.tagline: Greater Good guided fire, Stealth observers, Ghostkeel hammer
armies.playstyle: Pair Observer and Guided units on the same Spotted target for BS buffs and Ignores Cover. Aun'Shar aur buffs nearby units; Ghostkeel and Stealths skirmish while Strike Team holds the line.

battleTraits.name: The Greater Good
battleTraits.summary: In Shooting, Observer + Guided pairs on a Spotted target: Guided improves BS by 1; Markerlight Observer adds Ignores Cover. Shooting other targets worsens BS by 1.

enhancements.name: DS13 Experimental Drone
enhancements.summary: Aun'Shar gains Lone Operative and Stealth; T'au within 6" improve saves by 1 and gain Feel No Pain 5+.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Default — defensive bubble.

enhancements.name: DS15 Experimental Drone
enhancements.summary: Aun'Shar gains Lone Operative and Stealth; T'au within 6" gain Lethal Hits on ranged attacks.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Offensive aura for Strike Team volleys.

secondaryObjectives.name: Kauyon Lure
secondaryObjectives.summary: From round 2, score 5 VP if one or more units are in your deployment zone.

secondaryObjectives.name: Leadership Caste
secondaryObjectives.summary: Score 20 VP if Aun'Shar survives the battle.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Keep the Ethereal safe at all costs.

stratagems.name: Defensive Fusillade
stratagems.summary: One unit that has not shot gains Pistol on all weapons.

stratagems.name: Rapid Repositioning
stratagems.summary: End of Shooting, unengaged unit moves D6 (Battlesuits 6"); cannot charge.

stratagems.name: Laser-Marked Targets
stratagems.summary: When charged, shoot the charger (Hit on 6+ only) and subtract 2 from their Charge roll; cannot shoot again this turn.

armies.name: The Vardenghast Swarm
armies.tagline: Leviathan box swarm — Synapse, deep strike, and teeming Termagants
armies.playstyle: Termagants and Barbgaunts flood objectives while the Winged Prime and Psychophage hit weak points. Von Ryan's Leapers infiltrate and the Teeming Broods stratagem can recycle Termagants.

battleTraits.name: Synapse
battleTraits.summary: Tyranids units within 6" of a Synapse model take Battle-shock tests on 3D6 instead of 2D6.

battleTraits.name: Shadow in the Warp
battleTraits.summary: Once per battle in either Command phase, each enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Psychostatic Veil
enhancements.summary: Default — Terror of Vardenghast gains Lone Operative, 4+ invulnerable save, and -1 to Hit in melee against the bearer.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Safest first-game pick for a flying Warlord.

enhancements.name: Secretion Goad
enhancements.summary: Once per turn, a friendly Tyranids unit within 6" improves AP by 1 when selected to shoot or fight.
enhancements.newPlayerHint: Aggressive pick when Barbgaunts or Termagants need to punch through.

secondaryObjectives.name: Alpha Xenoform
secondaryObjectives.summary: At the end of each phase, score 4 VP if your Winged Tyranid Prime destroyed one or more enemy models that phase.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Default — hunt with the Terror of Vardenghast.

secondaryObjectives.name: Chitinous Tide
secondaryObjectives.summary: At the end of your turn, score 5 VP if you control objectives within 6" of the opponent's deployment zone.
secondaryObjectives.newPlayerHint: Push Termagants deep for board control.

stratagems.name: Hyper-reactive
stratagems.summary: When targeted, subtract 1 from Hit rolls against your Infantry unit.

stratagems.name: Voracious Assault
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Hit rolls when attacking the closest eligible target in Shooting or Fight.

stratagems.name: Teeming Broods
stratagems.summary: Return D6 Termagant models, or spawn a 2D6-model unit in Reserves if the unit was destroyed.

missions.name: Clash of Patrols
missions.missionRuleSummary: Retrieve Intelligence — from round 2, recover data from controlled objectives once each (Warlord on field grants 1CP).
missions.primaryObjectiveSummary: Take and Hold — 5 VP per objective you control at end of Command phase (rounds 2–4).
missions.scoringNotes: Round 5: second-turn player scores at end of turn.

missions.name: Archeotech Recovery
missions.missionRuleSummary: Irradiated Power Cells — remove No Man's Land markers in rounds 3–5.
missions.primaryObjectiveSummary: Recover Archeotech — 5 VP per objective at end of Command phase; +10 VP for last NML objective.
missions.scoringNotes: Gamma/Beta markers shift each round — track which objective is hot.

missions.name: Forward Outpost
missions.missionRuleSummary: Sabotage Enemy Comms — control opponent's deployment objective to block their Command Re-roll.
missions.primaryObjectiveSummary: Vital Ground — 5 VP per NML objective + 10 VP for opponent's zone objective.
missions.scoringNotes: Round 5 second-turn player scores at end of turn.

missions.name: Scorched Earth
missions.missionRuleSummary: Raze and Ruin — raze controlled objectives from round 2 (Attacker never A, Defender never B).
missions.primaryObjectiveSummary: 5 VP if you control any objective; +5 if more than opponent; +10 if you razed this turn.
missions.scoringNotes: Round 5 second-turn player scores at end of turn.

missions.name: Sweeping Raid
missions.missionRuleSummary: Supply Lines — D6 4+ for 1CP when you control your deployment objective at start of Command.
missions.primaryObjectiveSummary: Priority Targets — 5 VP per objective (rounds 2–4); end-game bonus for zone markers.
missions.scoringNotes: Attacker scores C/D at battle end; Defender scores A/B.

missions.name: Display of Might
missions.missionRuleSummary: Break Their Spirit + Claim Sites — Insane Bravery only near Warlord; Characters claim NML sites.
missions.primaryObjectiveSummary: Symbolic Sites — up to four 5 VP scoring conditions per turn.
missions.scoringNotes: Round 5 second-turn player scores at end of turn.

matchSteps.title: Choose Combat Patrols
matchSteps.summary: Each player picks a faction and fixed patrol roster.
matchSteps.body: Combat Patrol armies are fixed box-set rosters — no list building. Pick the patrol each player fields today. Tap Use Starter Matchup for the built-in Space Marines vs Tyranids demo, or choose any of the 23 faction patrols in the list.
tips: Tap Use Starter Matchup for Strike Force Octavius vs The Vardenghast Swarm (demo only).
All 23 faction Combat Patrol boxes appear in the picker — pick the patrol you own.
All 23 faction Combat Patrol boxes include full battle tracker datasheets — pick the patrol you own.

matchSteps.title: Pick Enhancement & Secondary
matchSteps.summary: Each player picks one Enhancement and one Secondary Objective.
matchSteps.body: Each player picks one Enhancement (a bonus for your leader) and one Secondary Objective (an extra way to score points). Recommended defaults are marked below — tap Use recommended defaults for a first game.
tips: First game? Tap Use recommended defaults on this screen.
Enhancements upgrade your Warlord; secondaries shape how you score beyond the mission primary.

matchSteps.title: Pick Mission
matchSteps.summary: Roll D6 or choose one of six Combat Patrol missions.
matchSteps.body: Agree on a mission — roll a D6 or pick Clash of Patrols for your first game. Each mission has its own deployment map, mission rule, and primary objective.
tips: Clash of Patrols is the recommended first mission.
Open Missions Reference in the Game Guide for securing rules and scoring.

matchSteps.title: Set Up Battlefield
matchSteps.body: Place terrain on a 44"×30" board. Set up objective markers from the mission map. Roll off — winner picks attacker or defender. Attacker uses the Attacker deployment zone on the mission map.
tips: Objectives are 40mm markers unless your mission says otherwise.
Attacker deploys second but chooses who takes first turn later.

matchSteps.title: Declare Formations
matchSteps.summary: Patrol Squads splits, Leaders, Transports, Reserves.
matchSteps.body: Split Termagants into two 10-model units if desired. Attach Leaders to Bodyguard units. Set up units in Reserves or Deep Strike as listed on datasheets. No arrivals in battle round 1; arrive by end of round 3 or destroyed.
tips: Captain Octavius and Librarian Tantus can lead the Terminator Squad.
Von Ryan's Leapers have Infiltrators — set up accordingly.

matchSteps.title: Deploy Armies
matchSteps.body: Defender sets up wholly within their deployment zone, then the attacker deploys. Units in Reserves are declared now but not placed on the board.
tips: Check mission map for deployment zone boundaries.
Confirm Battle Ready (+10 VP) with your opponent before the first turn.

matchSteps.title: Roll for First Turn
matchSteps.summary: Attacker rolls — winner picks who goes first.
matchSteps.body: The attacker rolls off against the defender. The winner chooses which player takes the first turn. Record the choice — it affects round 5 scoring in many missions.
tips: Going second can score primaries at end of turn on battle round 5.
Mark first turn in the checklist when decided.

matchSteps.title: Fight the Battle
matchSteps.summary: Five rounds — Command through Fight, score VP to win.
matchSteps.body: Play five battle rounds. Each turn: Command, Movement, Shooting, Charge, Fight. Secure objectives with Battleline units in Command phase. Track secondaries, stratagems, and Battle Ready bonus.
tips: Battle-shock tests happen in the Command phase.
Round 5 scoring reminder: second-turn player may score at end of turn.
